rulings.Case Title: ANNETTE HORNSBY VS. NEW CENTURY MORTGAGE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Terminating And Monetary Sanctions For Pltf'S Failure To Obey Court Order To Provide Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 19, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS Notice Of Motion For Terminating And Monetary Sanctions For Plaintiff'S Failure To Obey Court Order To Provide Discovery. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion for terminating sanctions is DENIED. Monetary sanctions of $1,156 are granted to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff shall provide discovery responses no later than December 30, 2013. Defendant to prepare order and serve it by overnight mail no later than December 20, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EILEEN TATING VS. JPMORGAN CHASE, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 19, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR BY, EMC MORTGAGE LLC, FORMERLY KNOWN AS EMC MORTGAGE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. rulings.Case Title: M&M INVESTMENT PARTNERS LLC VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A., AS TRUSTEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 19, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF M&M INVESTMENT PARTNERS LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DENIED. Plaintiff failed to shift burden. Plaintiff's evidence that (1) unspecified bid was submitted (Rezaian Declaration 2); (2) bid was accepted on "specific terms of the Purchase Agreement with Joint Escrow Instructions" (Ex. 4 to Rezaian Declaration), which Agreement was not provided as evidence; (3) acceptance was subject to unidentified "necessary steps" (Ex. 4 to Rezaian Declaration); and that (4) only Plaintiff executed a document titled "Supplemental Escrow Instructions," does not establish an existence of a valid contract. Plaintiff's objections are sustained. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARISSOL LUSTOSA VS. GEORGE S TAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With N9otice Of Site Inspection And For Sanctions

PLAINTIFF MARISSOL LUSTOSA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Notice Of Site Inspection And For Sanctions. GRANTED as follows: Defendant shall comply with a Notice of Site Inspection to be set on a weekday, excluding holidays, of Plaintiff's choice no later than January 10, 2013.
